description: Never copy text — locate everything with loc.

loc.description: Line range in 01_normalized pages[].text split by \n. line_start and line_end are 1-based and inclusive. For items spanning multiple pages, set page_end to the last page; line_start is on page, line_end is on page_end.

page_end.description: End page (1-based). Omit or set equal to page for single-page items.

line_end.description: Last line on page_end (or page if single-page).

skip_pages.description: Page numbers (1-based) of purely navigational pages — cover, TOC, revision history, index. Emit no sections or spec_items from these pages.

spec_hierarchy_number.description: Section number verbatim from the document (e.g. '3.1'). Null for unnumbered headings.

level.description: Depth in the heading hierarchy (1 = top-level). Infer from numbering depth, indentation, or font size. Increment by 1 for each nesting level.

item_id.description: Spec item ID if the heading line itself carries one (e.g. 'SYS-NAV-HDR-001'). Null otherwise.

title.description: Heading text verbatim. Only field where copying is allowed — needed to build the section tree before loc resolution.

loc.description: Location of the heading line(s). Use line_end > line_start only if the heading wraps across lines.

spec_items.description: One entry per requirement or requirement-like statement. For docs with IDs, one entry per ID occurrence (duplicates preserved). For raw specs, one entry per distinct logical statement.

item_id.description: Requirement ID verbatim (e.g. 'SYS-FUNC-001'). Null for raw specs without formal IDs.

spec_hierarchy_number.description: Item number verbatim from the document (e.g. '3.1.2') if present. Null if the item has no explicit number.

item_type.description: Infer from explicit attribute or unambiguous ID prefix only. Null in all other cases.

classification.description: Infer from explicit attribute or unambiguous ID prefix only. Null in all other cases.

source.description: Layout the item was extracted from. 'table' signals potential extraction noise — Stage 4 treats content with lower confidence.

loc.description: Full item block, from the first line of the item to the last line before the next item or heading.

extra_attrs.description: Explicitly labeled sub-fields in the item text (e.g. 'Rationale:', 'Note:'). Keys: snake_case of the label. Values: loc. Do not invent — only emit if the label is present.

flags.description: Uncertainty flags. Use 'ambiguous_boundary' if unsure where the item ends; 'possible_table_noise' if extracted from a table.
